footer.body: This site is open for inspection as an AOHYS engineering sample; client and product code stays private.

publicPage.heroEvidenceAria: Public-safe project evidence inside the AOHYS hero system map

heroPrinciples.label: Workflow first.
heroPrinciples.text: The business path decides the build.

heroPrinciples.label: Connected system.
heroPrinciples.text: Product, data, communication, and operations move together.

publicPage.homeLead: I design and build software that connects product intent, backend reliability, operational clarity, and modern delivery practice. This site is also the public source sample behind that claim.
publicPage.proofHeading: The shell starts with evidence, not decoration.

proofRows.label: Architecture
proofRows.text: Public/private seams are visible from the first build.

proofRows.label: Selected work
proofRows.text: Casa Roca, The Barber Central, Nutri Plan, and enterprise systems.

proofRows.label: Career signal
proofRows.text: A clear resume path with deeper engineering context online.

publicPage.routeProofTitle: This page is wired for SEO, i18n, and future content depth.

routeProof.label: Stable ID
routeProof.text: The route resolves through the Public Content Graph, not duplicated Astro metadata.

routeProof.label: Localized path
routeProof.text: English stays unprefixed while Spanish remains under /es.

routeProof.label: Search behavior
routeProof.text: Canonical URLs, language alternates, robots, and sitemap inclusion share one source.

contactForm.formTitle: Tell me what you need to ship.
contactForm.formIntro: Share the goal, context, and best way to reach you. I will reply directly.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: What needs to exist, improve, launch, or become reliable?
contactForm.consentLabel: I understand AOHYS will use this information to respond to my request.
contactForm.successMessage: Request received. I will reply directly.
contactForm.degradedSuccessMessage: Request received. If the email notification is delayed, I can still see it in the dashboard.
contactForm.errorMessage: The form could not send right now. Use WhatsApp or email directly.
contactForm.validationMessage: Please review the highlighted fields before retrying.
contactForm.emailErrorMessage: The notification email could not be sent.
contactForm.backendErrorMessage: The contact backend is temporarily unavailable.
contactForm.endpointMissing: Contact endpoint is not configured for this environment.
contactForm.retryLabel: Try again, or use WhatsApp or email directly.
